cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30.3.0)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE C)
set_property(DIRECTORY PROPERTY INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "")
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS " -mcpu=cortex-m7 -mfpu=fpv5-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -mcpu=cortex-m7 -mfpu=fpv5-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "-O0 -g3")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "-mcpu=cortex-m7 -mfpu=fpv5-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T \"D:/rm/2026_code/1/embedded-2026-h7/STM32H723XG_FLASH.ld\" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=dm_mc02.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
add_definitions([==[-v]==])
cmake_policy(SET CMP0065 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0157 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "D:/rm/2026_code/1/embedded-2026-h7/.codex-build/Debug-infantry3/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-tgy4i8")
add_library(cmTC_8f0bf STATIC)
target_sources(cmTC_8f0bf PRIVATE
  "D:/Tools/Cmake/cmake-3.30.3-windows-x86_64/cmake-3.30.3-windows-x86_64/share/cmake-3.30/Modules/CMakeCCompilerABI.c"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_8f0bf_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_8f0bf>)
set_property(TARGET cmTC_8f0bf PROPERTY "C_EXTENSIONS" "ON")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_8f0bf PROPERTY "C_STANDARD" "17")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_8f0bf PROPERTY "C_STANDARD_REQUIRED" "ON")
target_link_libraries(cmTC_8f0bf ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
